normal.description: Worker standing safely away from the edge with guardrails in place.

anomalous.description: Worker standing at an unprotected edge.

normal.description: Worker climbing a ladder with both hands and one foot in contact at all times.

anomalous.description: Worker climbing a ladder without three points of contact.

normal.description: Worker on a fully assembled and secured scaffold with proper guardrails.
Worker walking carefully on a dry, clearly marked and non-slip surface.

anomalous.description: Worker walking on a wet, slippery surface.

normal.description: Worker standing in a clear zone away from overhead material storage areas.

anomalous.description: Worker standing under an area with materials overhead.

normal.description: Worker operating equipment at a safe and regulated distance from power lines.

anomalous.description: Worker operating equipment close to overhead power lines.

normal.description: Worker using an extension cord in good condition with fully intact wires.

anomalous.description: Worker using an extension cord with damaged wires.

normal.description: Worker using properly insulated and secured electrical wiring connections.

anomalous.description: Worker handling temporary electrical wiring connections.

normal.description: Worker using a fully functional and regularly inspected power tool.

anomalous.description: Worker using a damaged or defective power tool.

normal.description: Worker using a fibreglass ladder at a safe distance from electrical sources.

anomalous.description: Worker using a metal ladder close to electricity.
